moments.title: The Open Championship: Moving Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues today with the crucial third round at Royal Birkdale, as golfers battle for position ahead of tomorrow's final push.

angles.name: Moving Day Excitement
angles.copy: It's Moving Day at The Open! Who's making a charge up the leaderboard at Royal Birkdale? Every shot counts now. #TheOpen

angles.name: UK Golf Focus
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are in Southport for The Open Championship. Tune in for all the drama from Royal Birkdale today.

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Last Dance
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival kicks off its final ever edition today at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, promising a weekend of music across five stages.

angles.name: Emotional Farewell
angles.copy: It's the final Splendour Festival ever! Who's heading to Wollaton Hall today to say goodbye to one of Nottingham's favourite summer events? Make it count!

angles.name: Nottingham's Music Weekend
angles.copy: Nottingham, are you ready for Splendour? The last ever festival starts today at Wollaton Hall with a huge lineup across all stages. What acts are you catching?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Concludes
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, wraps up today after four days of traditional and contemporary Scottish music.

angles.name: HebCelt Finale
angles.copy: It's the final day of the Hebridean Celtic Festival! Who's been enjoying the incredible music and atmosphere in Stornoway this week? What was your highlight?

angles.name: Scottish Music Celebration
angles.copy: Four days of amazing music come to an end today at the Hebridean Celtic Festival. A true celebration of Scottish culture!

moments.title: Love Island UK Nears Finale
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the series finale just days away, promising more drama and coupling twists.

angles.name: Love Island Crunch Time
angles.copy: It's almost finale time in the Love Island villa! Who are you rooting for? Anything could still happen before the big day!

angles.name: Daily Dose of Drama
angles.copy: Catch up on all the latest Love Island drama tonight at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX. Are we in for another shock recoupling?

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday, Dion DiMucci
moments.blurb: Today, rock and roll and doo-wop legend Dion DiMucci, known for hits like 'Runaround Sue' and 'The Wanderer', celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Dion's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the iconic Dion! Still sounds incredible, still 'The Wanderer'. What's your favourite Dion track?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating the 87th birthday of rock and roll royalty, Dion! From doo-wop to folk, his music is timeless. Raise a glass!

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Motown icon Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha & The Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Motown Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Dancing in the street to celebrate! Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary Martha Reeves of Martha & The Vandellas. What a voice, what a legacy!

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves! Her Motown classics are still guaranteed to make you smile.

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Gruff Rhys
moments.blurb: Welsh musician Gruff Rhys, frontman of Super Furry Animals and a celebrated solo artist, turns 56 today.

angles.name: Welsh Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus! Happy 56th Birthday to our very own Gruff Rhys! What's your favourite Super Furry Animals track or solo gem?

angles.name: Indie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the brilliant Gruff Rhys! From Super Furry Animals to his eclectic solo work, he's a true indie legend.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are now in full swing or starting across the UK, bringing a peak season for family travel and local activities.

angles.name: Holiday Mode Activated
angles.copy: It's officially summer holidays for many across the UK! What are your plans for the next few weeks? Beaches, staycations or adventures abroad?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: Devon, the summer holidays are here! Time to explore our beautiful county. What local spots are you heading to with the family?

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master's Birthday
angles.copy: Get up for the down stroke! George Clinton turns 85 on July 22nd! The funkadelic visionary is still bringing the party.

angles.name: P-Funk Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the one and only Dr. Funkenstein, George Clinton, on July 22nd! His influence is endless.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: On July 22nd, we're wishing a huge Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley! What's your favourite Eagles song he sang on?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic voice of Don Henley on July 22nd! From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, his music is unforgettable.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Pop superstar, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Selena Gomez turns 34 on July 22nd! From Disney to chart-topper, she truly 'Can't Keep Her Hands to Herself'.

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 34th Birthday to Selena Gomez on July 22nd! What's your favourite Selena era, from her early days to now?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, known for its eclectic mix of music, arts, and comedy, returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary.

angles.name: Latitude at 20
angles.copy: Happy 20th Anniversary to Latitude Festival! Kicking off on July 23rd in Suffolk, who's heading to Henham Park for the music, arts & comedy?

angles.name: Suffolk's Summer Festival
angles.copy: Counting down to Latitude! From July 23-26, Henham Park will be alive with incredible acts and performances. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival takes over Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, featuring a diverse lineup across tech house, disco, bass, pop, and UK garage.

angles.name: Cheshire's New Festival
angles.copy: Cheshire, get ready! Together Again Festival starts July 24th at Bolesworth Castle with a huge lineup of dance, pop, and garage. Who's in?

angles.name: Dance & Nostalgia
angles.copy: From tech house to UK garage anthems, Together Again Festival promises a weekend of pure vibes from July 24-26. Time to hit the dancefloor!

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her music, acting, and dancing, celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: She's still Jenny from the Block! Happy 57th Birthday to the iconic Jennifer Lopez on July 24th! What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Celebrating a Superstar
angles.copy: Wishing a dazzling 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo on July 24th! Her energy is unmatched, her hits are legendary.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on July 26th! The man, the myth, the legend. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger on July 26th! Still got the moves, still got the voice.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer and songwriter for Queen, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrating! Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor, on July 26th! What a powerhouse.

angles.name: Celebrating a Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's Roger Taylor on July 26th! His drumming drove some of the greatest songs ever.

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, Darlene Love
moments.blurb: Vocal legend Darlene Love, known for her powerful voice and classic hits, celebrates her 85th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Wall of Sound Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Darlene Love on July 26th! A true powerhouse vocalist, her songs are pure joy.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 85th Birthday to the legendary Darlene Love on July 26th! Her voice is pure magic.

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Taylor Momsen
moments.blurb: Taylor Momsen, lead singer of The Pretty Reckless and actress, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to The Pretty Reckless frontwoman, Taylor Momsen, on July 26th! Still rocking hard and owning the stage.

angles.name: Celebrating a Force
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce 33rd Birthday to Taylor Momsen on July 26th! From acting to leading The Pretty Reckless, she's a true force.

moments.title: Happy 82nd Birthday, Bobbie Gentry
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Bobbie Gentry, famous for 'Ode to Billie Joe', celebrates her 82nd birthday on July 27th.

angles.name: Country-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 82nd Birthday to the enigmatic Bobbie Gentry on July 27th! 'Ode to Billie Joe' remains a masterpiece. What a talent!

angles.name: Timeless Storyteller
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 82nd Birthday to the unique voice of Bobbie Gentry on July 27th! Her songs are still captivating listeners today.

moments.title: Happy 59th Birthday, Juliana Hatfield
moments.blurb: Indie rock singer-songwriter Juliana Hatfield, known for her solo work and bands like Blake Babies, celebrates her 59th birthday on July 27th.

angles.name: Indie Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 59th Birthday to the brilliant Juliana Hatfield on July 27th! A true indie rock icon with an incredible back catalogue.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 59th Birthday to Juliana Hatfield on July 27th! Her distinctive sound has influenced so many artists.
